source.scope: Official-source-backed Algeria 2026 Article 104 annual IRG scale before category-specific tax abatements.

DZ.notes: Article 104 annual IRG scale with a DZD 240,000 zero-rate threshold and 23%, 27%, 30%, 33% and 35% marginal bands. Salary abatements, payroll withholding, category-specific schedules and contributions remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 Article 104 annual IRG on caller-confirmed taxable income before category-specific tax abatements.
